scene_summary: A gallery installation with a large ink-splattered panoramic wall canvas, a translucent hanging scrim, a thin orange horizon line, a paint-crusted roller on a plinth, wall plaques/thumbnail plates, a glass specimen tray of reeds, and a tray of black labeled egg-like vessels.
usable_surfaces: thin orange horizon line across canvas
cream wall plaque reading In Relation
three small enamel image plates on left wall
glass specimen tray with ink reeds
black labeled egg vessels in stone tray

detected_objects.label: Large panoramic splatter canvas
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Dominant beige wall-sized painted surface covered with dark roller marks, splatters, scratches, and repeated roller silhouettes.

detected_objects.label: Translucent hanging archive veil
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Large sheer curtain suspended from ceiling rail, visibly carrying ghosted ink marks and partially obscuring the wall painting behind it.

detected_objects.label: Paint-crusted printmaking roller
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Large cylindrical roller tool on a plinth, heavily coated with dark and cream paint splatter, with handle extending forward.

detected_objects.label: Cream plaque reading In Relation
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Rectangular cream wall plaque with clearly readable text 'In Relation.' mounted on the left wall.

detected_objects.label: Upper enamel thumbnail plate
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Small dark rectangular plate on the left wall with cream splatter markings and rounded corners.

detected_objects.label: Middle enamel thumbnail plate
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Second small rectangular splattered plate below the top plate, mounted vertically on the left wall.

detected_objects.label: Lower enamel thumbnail plate
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Third small dark splattered plate on the left wall, aligned beneath the other two thumbnail plates.

detected_objects.label: Glass tray of ink reeds
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Transparent shallow glass tray on a plinth containing thin dark reed-like objects over a pale paper/map-like base.
